title: Pinnacle West Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: PHOENIX--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pinnacle West Capital Corp.'s board of directors declared a quarterly dividend of $0.88 per share of common stock payable on March 1, 2024.

title: ALE vs. PNW: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
text: Investors looking for stocks in the Utility - Electric Power sector might want to consider either Allete (ALE) or Pinnacle West (PNW). But which of these two stocks offers value investors a better bang for their buck right now?

title: Pinnacle West (PNW) Rides on Investments, Clean Power Generation
text: Pinnacle West (PNW) is expected to further benefit from its long-term investment plan, clean power generation and expanding customer base.
